\tzpentry{ID5534}{Displacement Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5534 introduces Displacement Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{D^2\xi^\mu}{D\tau^2} + R^\mu{}_{\nu\rho\sigma}u^\nu\xi^\rho u^\sigma =0. \end{equation}
